name: drydock
description: Idea-to-production engineering pipeline for Claude Code — 15 agents take a product from architecture and API contracts through tested code, security, CI/CD, and compliance to ship.

plugins.name: drydock
plugins.description: Transforms Claude Code from raw code generation into a full production-ready engineering system. 15 specialized agents cover architecture, API-first contracts, tested backend/frontend, observability, security-by-default, CI/CD hardening, automated testing, performance budgets, feature flags, and regulatory compliance — from idea to ship.
